opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I scratched my leg yesterday, and now it feels like acid is burning deep inside my muscle, and the redness is spreading by the hour!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Rapidly spreading, extremely painful rash and swelling after a minor scratch.

symptom_narrative.onset: minor garden scratch 24 hours ago, redness/swelling escalating since, high fever over the last 4 hours
symptom_narrative.character: excruciating, burning pain deep in the leg, far worse than the visible scratch would suggest
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: like acid burning inside the muscle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: spreading and worsening by the hour
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: high fever, severe malaise, dark fluid-filled blisters forming on the skin, spouse says he has become increasingly confused
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no previous episodes like this, sustained only a minor scratch from gardening
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, groaning in severe pain, unable to bear weight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: spouse present, marked the spreading border of the redness with a pen 2 hours ago to track progression

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: in agony, spouse terrified by how fast it's spreading

access_barriers.transport: spouse present but patient cannot safely mobilise given pain and instability
